title: Multimedia - Sound
summary: 9618 — sampling, bit depth, sample rate, and sound file size.
learningObjectives: Explain analogue to digital conversion of sound.
Define sample rate and bit depth.
Describe effects of sampling parameters on quality.

simpleExplanation.title: Digitising sound waves
simpleExplanation.summary: Sound is sampled at intervals. Each sample stores amplitude as a binary value. Higher rate and depth improve quality but increase file size.

sections.content: **Multimedia sound** (1.2.2) mirrors **graphics file sizing**. Show **formula with units** in calculations.
